channel.title: My Article Podcast
channel.description: Audio versions of interesting articles converted to MP3 for easy listening
channel.itunes:author: Skyentific
channel.itunes:summary: Audio versions of interesting articles converted to MP3 for easy listening

item.title: What's Next for Chinese Open-Source AI - MIT Technology Review
item.description: Audio version of MIT Technology Review article by Caiwei Chen. Chinese open-source AI models like DeepSeek, Qwen, and Kimi are spreading globally, matching Western performance at lower costs. This episode explores China's commitment to open source, the rise of specialized models, and how Chinese AI is becoming infrastructure for global builders.
item.itunes:subtitle: MIT Technology Review on Chinese open-source AI models like DeepSeek, Qwen, and Kimi
item.itunes:summary: Chinese open-source AI models are spreading globally, matching Western performance at fraction of the cost. Analysis of China open-source strategy and impact.

item.title: The Adolescence of Technology - Dario Amodei
item.description: Audio version of Dario Amodei's essay exploring AI risks including autonomy, bioweapons, authoritarianism, economic disruption, and unknown unknowns.
item.itunes:subtitle: Audio version of Dario Amodei essay on AI risks and humanity technological adolescence
item.itunes:summary: Audio version of Dario Amodei essay "The Adolescence of Technology" - exploring AI risks including autonomy, bioweapons, authoritarianism, economic disruption, and unknown unknowns.
